name: strategy-labs-plugins
description: Official plugin marketplace from Strategy Labs — boutique performance marketing tools for eCommerce and lead generation brands.

plugins.name: brand-content-os
plugins.description: Brand & Content Operating System — capture brand knowledge, enforce voice consistency, and generate on-brand content across paid ads, email, SMS, Shopify, and social channels. Includes Fast.io team sync and organized output directories.

plugins.name: customer-driven-optimizations
plugins.description: Analyze recorded customer phone calls to extract competitive intelligence, identify site optimization opportunities, map customer journeys, and generate a deployable HTML dashboard. Supports both audio files and pre-made transcripts. Integrates with Brand Content OS for brand context.
